steps.t: The cage-waggons can be found to the south-east of Ondoher's Folly. Faramir has asked you to dismantle the cage-waggons making for Ondoher's Folly and…
Artamir can be found to the south outside Ondoher's Folly in Dagorlad. You damaged the cage-waggons and learned much of the master of Ondoher's Folly,…
